title: All animals together
text: Cats and dogs and birds and bees. Foxes, bears, and busy ants. Rabbits hop, and turtles crawl. Fish swim in the sea below. All the animals make the world fun!
tips: Lots of animal words in flow
Picture each animal as you type

character_tips.anna: Block 5! All your animal friends together.
character_tips.maxim: Vocabulary review at speed. Image-anchored prose.
character_tips.klavochka: Every animal you love, my sunshine 💕
